highlights.description: 1 year of hands-on experience designing and optimizing cloud-based data platforms on AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Fabric.
Strong background in building scalable data pipelines with Apache Airflow and dbt, optimizing SQL performance, and implementing data governance for analytics and BI.
Experienced in software development, low-code/no-code solutions, and Agile/Scrum project delivery.
Former double major in Information Systems and Economics, bringing both technical and business perspectives to data engineering solutions.

experience.title: DATA ENGINEER
experience.description: FPT Software is a leading global IT services provider in Vietnam, specializing in digital transformation, software development, and outsourcing across various industries.
achievements: Supported designing data ingestion mechanisms to connect hospital systems through Azure Data Factory connectors and FHIR APIs via Azure Event Hubs, landing all raw data into Azure Data Lake to ensure immutable storage, traceability, and downstream processing.

Orchestrated data workflows using Fabric Data Pipelines, fault-tolerant with retries, fallback, and schema evolution through pre-validation configuration tables, monitoring with pipeline run notifications integrated into Microsoft Teams.

Implemented big data transformations using Spark for distributed processing, converting raw AS-IS data into standardized raw layers, and dbt with fully supported API to build Silver and Gold layers for data modeling, aggregation, and data quality validation.

Additionally supported the development of AI mapping engine, a tool automatically mapping between heterogeneous schemas, significantly reducing manual schema mapping effort through AI-assisted suggestions.
Delivered operational and analytical healthcare insights, pipeline monitoring and data quality through Power BI dashboards.
Exposed FHIR APIs to enable external system integrations and support healthcare interoperability requirements.

Supported integrating dbt with DataHub to enhance data governance capabilities, centralized data cataloging, data quality monitoring, and end-to-end data lineage tracking across the healthcare data platform.

experience.title: SOFTWARE IMPLEMENTATION
experience.description: Luklak is a next-generation unified & universal enterprise application platform that integrates diverse and specialized business functions into a single system.
achievements: Delivered customized software solutions for 10+ businesses across diverse industries by gathering, analyzing, and clarifying client requirements, optimized operations in areas such as CRM and HRM.

Designed and deployed automated workflows using n8n, and integrated Luklak with third-party platforms (e.g., Nhanh.vn, Sapo, Brevo), enabling seamless data exchange and reducing manual effort in daily operations.

Developed an automation solution for telesales reporting by aggregating raw data with Pandas, processing reports with Google Apps Script, and automating delivery via n8n. This reduced manual work by ~1 hour per day and improved reporting accuracy and timeliness.

projects.title: Fabric Data Platform for BEAUT? Cosmetic
projects.description: Fabric-based data platform using Lambda Architecture for e-commerce operations, enabling fraud detection, user behavior monitoring, and intelligent customer experience features.

education.school: Hanoi University of Science and Technology (HUST)

awards.title: Second Prize, FPT Data Hackathon
awards.description: Awarded for the Fabric Data Platform for BEAUT? Cosmetic project.
